targets.queryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, shares, market_value, weight_pct, projected_monthly_dividend, unrealized_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY market_value DESC LIMIT 3
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, shares, market_value, weight_pct, projected_monthly_dividend, unrealized_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY market_value DESC LIMIT 3

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, vol_30d_pct, beta_3y, sharpe_1y, sortino_1y, max_drawdown_1y_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 3
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, vol_30d_pct, beta_3y, sharpe_1y, sortino_1y, max_drawdown_1y_pct FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 3

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, reliability_consistency_score, reliability_missed_payments_12m, reliability_trend_6m, distribution_frequency FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY reliability_consistency_score ASC, weight_pct DESC LIMIT 4
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, reliability_consistency_score, reliability_missed_payments_12m, reliability_trend_6m, distribution_frequency FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local=(SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY reliability_consistency_score ASC, weight_pct DESC LIMIT 4
